_comment: Single LLM configuration. Set 'active' to pick your provider. Offline/local providers default to 1-hour timeout so slow systems work. Online providers use shorter timeouts. API keys can also be set via env vars: LLM_OPENAI_API_KEY, LLM_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, LLM_GEMINI_API_KEY, or generic LLM_API_KEY.

openai-compatible._comment: Works with LM Studio, Ollama (OpenAI mode), LocalAI, vLLM, or any OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Set timeout to 0 for auto-detection.

ollama._comment: Direct Ollama API. Ensure Ollama is running. For models like llama3, mistral, etc.
